zh.lifeSummary: 當Eiall nic Eth於1088年出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏時，她的父親Mac Eth?28歲，母親Nic Sween?18歲。她於1130年之前與Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1150年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年62歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾可雷南。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eiall nic Eth于1088年出生在英国苏格兰費伏时，她的父亲Mac Eth?28岁，母亲Nic Sween?18岁。她于1130年之前与Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1150年在苏格兰阿吉爾享年62岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾可雷南。

nameMeanings.name: nic
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Nick, a pet form of Nichol and Nicholas .
South German: from a pet form of the personal name Nikolaus (see Nicholas ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Negus
meanings: English: perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Nikecus, Nikus (a pet fom of Nicol(e), male or female) + the hypcoristic suffix -cus. See Nick , Nichol . In the modern form of this name, the voicing of /k/ to /g/ may have been encouraged by false association with the word Negus meaning ‘emperor of Ethiopia’ (see 3 below), which appears first in 1594 and 1613 in East Anglian authors as neguz.

Romanian (Neguş): from Neguş, a diminutive of the personal name Neagu, a short form of any of various South Slavic personal names composed of the element neg ‘to take care of, to nurse’, e.g. Negomir (Romanian Neagomir).

Ethiopian: from the personal name Negus, meaning e.g. ‘king’ in the Amharic language. — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

variants.name: Neck
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English necke ‘neck’ (Old English hnecca), denoting someone with some peculiarity of the neck. Symon Chortneke, i.e. ‘short neck’, is probably identical with Symon Nekeles, i.e. ‘neckless’, both recorded in 1275 in the Norfolk Hundred Rolls.
English: perhaps also a variant of   Nick  .
German: from Neck, the name of a water sprite.

variants.name: Nichol
meanings: Scottish and northern English: from the Middle English personal name Nic(h)ol(e), a vernacular form of Nic(h)olas (see Nicholas ). Compare Nickel and Nicol .

In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Greek Nikolas , its variant Nicolas , or of any of various derivatives of the personal name Nikola(o)s ‘Nicholas’, including Nikolis (see Nicoli ). Compare Nicholas and Nicol .

variants.name: Nickens
meanings: Apparently a patronymic from a pet form of   Nick  .

nameMeanings.name: Eth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: from a dialect variant of   Ried  .

variants.name: Ried
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Friedrich, Johann.
German: topographic name from Middle High German riet ‘damp, mossy area, wet land’ or ‘reed grass, swamp’.
German: habitational name from any of various places so named in Hesse, Baden-Württemberg, Austria, Switzerland.

nameMeanings.name: Eiall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of disputed derivation; it may mean ‘cloud’, ‘passionate’, or perhaps ‘champion’. It was adopted by the Scandinavians in the form Njal and soon became very popular among them. From the Middle Ages onwards, this name was found mainly in Ireland, the Highlands of Scotland, and the English-Scottish Border region. However, it has been strongly revived among non-Gaelic speakers since the latter part of the 20th century.

variants.name: Neal
meanings: Variant spelling of   Neil .

variants.name: Neale
meanings: Anglicized form of the enduringly popular Gaelic name   Niall .  From the Middle Ages onwards, this name was found mainly in Ireland, the Highlands of Scotland, and the English-Scottish Border region. However, since the 20th century it has spread to enjoy considerable popularity in all parts of the English-speaking world, although in England it has recently been overtaken by the Gaelic form.

variants.name: Neil
meanings: Anglicized form of the enduringly popular Gaelic name   Niall .  From the Middle Ages onwards, this name was found mainly in Ireland, the Highlands of Scotland, and the English-Scottish Border region. However, since the 20th century it has spread to enjoy considerable popularity in all parts of the English-speaking world, although in England it has recently been overtaken by the Gaelic form.

en.lifeSummary: When Eiall nic Eth was born in 1088, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Mac Eth?, was 28 and her mother, Nic Sween?, was 18. She married Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow before 1130, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1150, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 62, and was buried in Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eiall nic Eth est née en 1088, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Mac Eth?, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Nic Sween?, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow avant 1130, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1150, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eiall nic Eth 1088 in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Mac Eth? 28 und ihre Mutter Nic Sween? 18. Sie hat vor 1130 in Scotland Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1150 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow prima del 1130, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1150, nel Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eiall nic Ethが1088年にイギリススコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父Mac Eth?は28歳，母Nic Sween?は18歳であった。1130年以前にスコットランドでSir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1150年にスコットランドアルグイルで62歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトキルチレナンにて埋葬された。

ko.Church of St. Peter the Deacon Kilchrena: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬크리난
ko.lifeSummary: Eiall nic Eth(이)가 1088년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mac Eth?(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nic Sween?(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1130년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1150년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬크리난에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eiall nic Eth nasceu em 1088, em Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Mac Eth?, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Nic Sween?, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow antes 1130, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1150, em Argyll, Scotland, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Church of St. Peter the Deacon Kilchrena: килчренан, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eiall nic Eth родилась в 1088 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Mac Eth? было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Nic Sween?, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow перед 1130 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1150 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности килчренан, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eiall nic Eth nació en 1088, en Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Mac Eth?, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Nic Sween?, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow antes de 1130, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1150, en Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido.
